title: 6 Reviewing Submitted Reports in ServiceNow
body_text:
6	Reviewing Submitted Reports in ServiceNow
6.1	Overview of Reviewing Submitted Reports in ServiceNow
You can view CEBA repayment information and loan administration fee reports submitted by your financial institution in ServiceNow, under My Company.
To view submitted reports:
Log in to ServiceNow as described in Section 3.1, Logging in to ServiceNow.
Select
My Company
. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Selecting ГўВҖВңMy CompanyГўВҖВқ in ServiceNow
Select a category. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: CEBA Categories
6.2	Repayment Categories
You can select a column heading to sort the repayment records by topic within each category. Records that havenГўВҖВҷt been submitted to EDC can be edited or cancelled. Once a repayment record is submitted to EDC, all fields in the record are locked, and the submission date is displayed in the ГўВҖВңDate Submitted to EDCГўВҖВқ column.
The CEBA Repayment Categories are:
1.
CEBA Repayments ГўВҖВ“ Overall
ГўВҖВ“ Displays all CEBA repayment records. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Records in the CEBA Repayments ГўВҖВ“ Overall Category
2.
CEBA Repayment ГўВҖВ“ Searchable
ГўВҖВ“ Displays all CEBA repayment records with search options. See Figure 3. To search for a record:
ГўВ‘
Select the tab you want to search (Current Month, Previous Month, or Older).
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Enter search criteria (e.g., business name, CRA number).
ГўВ‘Вў
Select the
Search
icon to see the results.
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Select
Clear Search
to remove search results and return to the original page.
Figure 3: Records in the CEBA Repayment ГўВҖВ“ Searchable Category
3.
CEBA Repayment ГўВҖВ“ Received
ГўВҖВ“ Displays the CEBA repayment records that Central 1 received from your financial institution. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Records in the CEBA Repayment ГўВҖВ“ Received Category
4.
CEBA Repayment ГўВҖВ“ Submitted to EDC
ГўВҖВ“ Displays the CEBA repayment records submitted to EDC. These records cannot be edited or cancelled. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Records in the CEBA Repayment ГўВҖВ“ Submitted to EDC Category
5.
CEBA Application ГўВҖВ“ Repayment Plan
ГўВҖВ“ Provides repayment plan assignments for your business members. See Figure 6. Use the repayment message templates provided by EDC to inform your business members.
Figure 6: Records in the CEBA Application ГўВҖВ“ Repayment Plan Category
6.3	Loan Administration Fee Categories
You can select a column heading to sort the loan administration fee records by topic within each category. Records that havenГўВҖВҷt been submitted to EDC can be edited or cancelled. Once a loan administration fee record is submitted to EDC, all fields in the record are locked, and the submission date is displayed in the ГўВҖВңDate Submitted to EDCГўВҖВқ column.
The CEBA Loan Administration Fee categories are:
1.
CEBA Loan Administration Fee ГўВҖВ“ Received
ГўВҖВ“ Displays all CEBA loan administration records that your financial institution sent to Central 1. See Figure 7.
Figure 7: Records in the CEBA Loan Administration Fee ГўВҖВ“ Received Category
If you need to make a correction before Central 1 sends the report to EDC, you can open the ticket and make changes. See Figure 8.
ГўВ‘
Calculated Loan Administration Fee for Quarter
ГўВҖВ“ The information in this field can be edited.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Loan Administration Fee Due for Quarter
ГўВҖВ“ The amount due is automatically adjusted based on the change you make to the amount of your calculated loan administration fee.
ГўВ‘Вў
Select
Save
.
Figure 8: Editing the CEBA Loan Administration Fee Report
2.
CEBA Loan Administration Fee
ГўВҖВ“ Submitted to EDC
ГўВҖВ“ Displays all CEBA loan administration records that Central 1 sent to EDC. See FigureВ 9.
Figure 9: Records in the CEBA Loan Administration Fee ГўВҖВ“ Submitted to EDC Category
END
